items.title: Texas Tech star G Anderson to stay in NBA draft
items.summary: Texas Tech guard Christian Anderson, a projected top-20 NBA pick, is keeping his name in the draft, per his agent, Aaron Mintz of CAA Basketball. The 6-3 Anderson averaged 18.5 points, 7.4 assists while shooting 41.5% from 3-point range.
